title: Manufacturing Engineer - Sika India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Sika India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Sika India are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Sika India:
Sika India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sika India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
